policy.title: Canonical JSON Format Policy
policy.body: Repository JSON source documents should use canonical root keys `index`, `content`, and `metadata` when their shape is owned by SocratexPipeline and the file is meant to be human/AI-readable structured documentation. Runtime/game-owned data, generated artifacts, external schemas, eval result protocols, and operational config files may keep their direct schema only when listed here with an explicit reason.

generated_exclusions.title: Generated Or Runtime Exclusions
generated_exclusions.rule: Audit skips these because their shape is generated, local, diagnostic, or runtime-owned rather than source-document-owned.

paths.CHANGELOG.json: Changelog registry currently has script-owned `summary/entries` protocol; migrate after changelog readers/writers are canonical-aware.
paths.evals/expected-behaviors.json: Eval protocol consumed by check_evals; keep direct schema until eval tooling is canonical-aware.
paths.evals/personas.json: Eval protocol consumed by check_evals; keep direct schema until eval tooling is canonical-aware.
paths.evals/results/baseline.json: Eval result protocol; keep direct schema for score comparison.
paths.evals/results/with-pipeline.json: Eval result protocol; keep direct schema for score comparison.
paths.templates/WORKFLOW.json: Installed project workflow template has direct project-facing schema; migrate after project workflow readers are canonical-aware.
paths.templates/code/BUGS-SOLVED.json: Installed project memory template; migrate with the project-memory canonicalization group.
paths.templates/code/BUGS.json: Installed project memory template; migrate with the project-memory canonicalization group.
paths.templates/code/CHANGELOG.json: Installed project changelog template mirrors current changelog script protocol.
paths.templates/code/DECISIONS.json: Installed project memory template; migrate with the project-memory canonicalization group.
paths.templates/code/PIPELINE-CONFIG.json: Operational config template read and updated by setup/reinitialization scripts through direct properties.
paths.templates/code/STATE.json: Installed active-state template; migrate with the project-memory canonicalization group.
paths.templates/code/TODO.json: Installed backlog template; migrate with the project-memory canonicalization group.
paths.templates/code/_INSTRUCTION-QUEUE.json: Installed instruction queue template; migrate with queue tooling.
paths.templates/code/_PLAN.json: Installed plan template; migrate with project-memory plan tooling.
paths.templates/code/_PROMPT-QUEUE.json: Installed prompt queue template; migrate with queue tooling.
paths.templates/code/context-docs/FROZEN_LAYER: Installed context capsule template; migrate with project context template group.
paths.templates/code/context-docs/TECHNICAL.js: Installed context capsule template; migrate with project context template group.
paths.templates/code/current_task.json: Temporary task handoff schema; keep direct until task tooling is canonical-aware.
paths.templates/team/experience.json: Team role lens direct schema; migrate with team-lens template group.
paths.templates/team/performance.json: Team role lens direct schema; migrate with team-lens template group.
paths.templates/team/pipeline.json: Team role lens direct schema; migrate with team-lens template group.
paths.templates/team/product.json: Team role lens direct schema; migrate with team-lens template group.
paths.templates/team/technical.json: Team role lens direct schema; migrate with team-lens template group.
paths.templates/workspace.json: Workspace marker schema consumed by workspace resolver; keep direct as an external/local marker protocol.

migration_followups.title: Migration Followups
items: Make changelog readers/writers canonical-aware, then migrate root and template CHANGELOG.json.
Define canonical project-memory templates for STATE, PLAN, TODO, BUGS, DECISIONS, prompt/instruction queues, and context capsules.
Decide whether eval protocols should remain direct test fixtures or gain canonical wrappers.
Decide whether team role lenses should become canonical documents or remain compact direct role schemas.
Keep PIPELINE-CONFIG and workspace marker direct until every setup/update/reinitialize reader supports canonical accessors.

metadata.title: JSON Format Contract
metadata.role: Audit contract for canonical JSON document shape and explicit non-canonical exceptions.
